failedAssertions.reason: Backend returns 403 Forbidden on all tenant lifecycle mutation requests. Frontend UI exists correctly. Deferred for backend follow-up tracked in ERP-16.
Requires backend seeding of tenant HOLD/suspended state which is not available. Tenant suspend action also failed with 403. Deferred for backend follow-up tracked in ERP-16.
Requires backend seeding of tenant BLOCKED state which is not available. Deferred for backend follow-up tracked in ERP-16.
Frontend UI for user actions exists but backend returns 403 Forbidden. Deferred for backend follow-up tracked in ERP-16.
Suspend action exists but backend returns 403. MFA disable requires MFA-enabled user. Deferred for backend follow-up tracked in ERP-16.
Onboarding UI exists with 2-step flow including temp password field. Backend returns 403 on submit. Deferred for backend follow-up tracked in ERP-16.
Configure modules button exists but produces no visible result. Deferred for backend follow-up tracked in ERP-16.
Export approvals surface loads but no pending exports exist to test decision flow. Requires seeded test data.
Dealer created support ticket successfully but superadmin receives 403 Forbidden when accessing /api/v1/support/tickets. Backend authorization issue.
Credit request surfaces load but no pending requests exist. Dealer submission encountered 403. Requires seeded data and working backend.

appliedUpdates.description: No updates needed - existing guidance covered admin/superadmin testing adequately

systemicBlockers.recommendation: Backend permissions/readiness and seeded admin validation data need to be restored before these assertions can be validated. Frontend UI is correctly implemented.

systemicBlockers.issue: Missing seeded test data for export approvals and credit requests
systemicBlockers.recommendation: Seed pending export requests and credit requests in MOCK company for full cross-surface validation.

systemicBlockers.issue: Superadmin support ticket access blocked by 403
systemicBlockers.recommendation: Backend may need to provide a different endpoint or permission for superadmin to view cross-tenant support tickets.

frontendUiVerified: Tenant lifecycle actions (Edit details, Suspend, Configure modules, Reset admin password, Send support warning) visible and accessible
User management actions (View, Edit, Suspend, Force reset password, Delete) available for tenant admins
Onboarding wizard has proper 2-step flow with temporary password field and first-login change note
Role management correctly shows read-only for tenant admins and Create Role for superadmin
Settings page correctly shows read-only for tenant admins with clear messaging
Runtime metrics and policy forms correctly scoped by role

orchestratorDeferral.justification: These remaining admin assertions depend on backend mutation permissions, endpoint access, and seeded validation data rather than unfinished frontend UI work. They were moved into a follow-up milestone so the mission can continue while backend validation support is prepared.
